---
title: "Simulation-only checks for synthetic data"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Simulation-only checks for the synthetic data analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

This vignette exercises only the simulation portion of the synthetic-data workflow. We avoid the JASP UI glue in this document and focus entirely on the row resampling and optional jittering that happens once JASP calls `syntheticData()`.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)

library(dplyr)
library(palmerpenguins)
```

## Synthetic Data Function

```{r}
resample_categorical_groups <- function(dat, categoricalCols) {
  rows <- seq_len(nrow(dat))
  key_mat <- lapply(dat[, categoricalCols, drop = FALSE], function(col) {
    if (is.factor(col)) {
      col <- as.character(col)
    }
    ifelse(is.na(col), "<NA>", col)
  })
  key_strings <- do.call(paste, c(key_mat, sep = "\r"))
  groups <- split(rows, key_strings)
  syn <- do.call(rbind, lapply(groups, function(idx) {
    dat[sample(idx, size = length(idx), replace = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
  }))
  syn
}
syntheticData <- function(jaspResults, dataset, options, state, ...) {
  requestedCols <- options$variables
  if (is.list(requestedCols)) {
    requestedCols <- unlist(requestedCols, use.names = FALSE)
  }
  if (is.null(requestedCols)) {
    requestedCols <- character(0)
  }
  requestedCols <- trimws(requestedCols)
  requestedCols <- requestedCols[nzchar(requestedCols)]

  # --- 1) Get data -----------------------------------------------------------
  if (missing(dataset) || is.null(dataset)) {
    if (requireNamespace("jaspBase", quietly = TRUE)) {
      cols <- try(requestedCols, silent = TRUE)
      dataset <- jaspBase::readDatasetToEnd(columns = if (!inherits(cols, "try-error") && length(cols) > 0) cols else NULL)
    } else {
      stop("Dataset not provided and jaspBase not available.")
    }
  }

  selectedCols <- if (length(requestedCols) > 0) requestedCols else names(dataset)
  selectedCols <- intersect(selectedCols, names(dataset))
  dat <- dataset[, selectedCols, drop = FALSE]
  if (ncol(dat) > 0L) {
    names(dat) <- selectedCols
  }

  # --- 2) Classify variables -------------------------------------------------
  if (ncol(dat) == 0L) {
    typeInfo <- data.frame(variable = character(), type = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  } else {
    isNum <- vapply(dat, is.numeric, FUN.VALUE = logical(1))
    typeInfo <- data.frame(
      variable = names(dat),
      type = ifelse(isNum, "Continuous", "Categorical"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  # --- 3) Generate synthetic data for each column via jittered resampling ---
  if (nrow(dat) == 0L) {
    syn <- dat[0, , drop = FALSE]
  } else {
    set.seed(options$seed %||% 123)
    rowCountMode <- options$rowCountMode %||% "same"
    if (identical(rowCountMode, "same")) {
      n_target <- nrow(dat)
    } else {
      n_target <- options$n %||% options$nRows %||% nrow(dat)
      n_target <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(n_target))
      if (is.na(n_target) || n_target <= 0) {
        n_target <- nrow(dat)
      }
    }

    numericCols <- names(dat)[vapply(dat, is.numeric, FUN.VALUE = logical(1))]
    categoricalCols <- setdiff(names(dat), numericCols)

    if (identical(rowCountMode, "same") && length(categoricalCols) > 0) {
      syn <- resample_categorical_groups(dat, categoricalCols)
    } else {
      draw_idx <- sample.int(n = nrow(dat), size = n_target, replace = TRUE)
      syn <- dat[draw_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    }
    if (ncol(syn) > 0L) {
      names(syn) <- selectedCols
    }
    jitterFraction <- options$jitterFraction %||% 0
    jitterFraction <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(jitterFraction))
    if (is.na(jitterFraction) || jitterFraction < 0) {
      jitterFraction <- 0
    }
    numericCols <- names(dat)[vapply(dat, is.numeric, FUN.VALUE = logical(1))]
    if (jitterFraction > 0 && length(numericCols) > 0) {
      colSd <- vapply(dat[, numericCols, drop = FALSE], function(x) stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE), numeric(1))
      colSd[is.na(colSd)] <- 0
      for (col in numericCols) {
        sd_val <- colSd[col]
        if (is.na(sd_val) || sd_val <= 0) {
          next
        }
        noise <- stats::rnorm(n = n_target, mean = 0, sd = jitterFraction * sd_val)
        syn[[col]] <- syn[[col]] + noise
      }
    }
  }

  syn
}
```

## Test Dataset

```{r}
data("penguins")
```

## Test Results

```{r}
cat_x <- lm(body_mass_g ~ sex, data = penguins)
summary(cat_x)

cont_x <- lm(body_mass_g ~ bill_length_mm + bill_depth_mm, data = penguins)
summary(cont_x)

mix_x <- lm(body_mass_g ~ bill_length_mm + bill_depth_mm + species, data = penguins)
summary(mix_x)
```

## Create Data

```{r run-simulation}
options_cat_x <- list(
  variables = c("body_mass_g", "sex"),
  seed = 2026,
  rowCountMode = "same",
  n = nrow(penguins),
  jitterFraction = 0
)

options_cont_x <- list(
  variables = c("body_mass_g", "bill_length_mm", "bill_depth_mm"),
  seed = 2026,
  rowCountMode = "same",
  n = nrow(penguins),
  jitterFraction = 0.1
)

options_mix_x <- list(
  variables = c("body_mass_g", "bill_length_mm", "bill_depth_mm", "species"),
  seed = 2026,
  rowCountMode = "same",
  n = nrow(penguins),
  jitterFraction = 0.08
)

simulated_cat_x <- syntheticData(
  jaspResults = NULL,
  dataset = penguins,
  options = options_cat_x,
  state = new.env(parent = emptyenv())
)

simulated_cont_x <- syntheticData(
  jaspResults = NULL,
  dataset = penguins,
  options = options_cont_x,
  state = new.env(parent = emptyenv())
)

simulated_mix_x <- syntheticData(
  jaspResults = NULL,
  dataset = penguins,
  options = options_mix_x,
  state = new.env(parent = emptyenv())
)
```

## Test Simulated Data

```{r}
penguins %>% 
  select(sex, body_mass_g) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  pull(sex) %>% 
  table()
table(penguins$sex)
table(simulated_cat_x$sex)

cat_x_sim <- lm(body_mass_g ~ sex, data = simulated_cat_x)
summary(cat_x)
summary(cat_x_sim)

cont_x_sim <- lm(body_mass_g ~ bill_length_mm + bill_depth_mm, data = simulated_cont_x)
summary(cont_x)
summary(cont_x_sim)

penguins %>% 
  select(species, body_mass_g, bill_length_mm, bill_depth_mm) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  pull(species) %>% 
  table()
table(penguins$species)
table(simulated_mix_x$species)

mix_x_sim <- lm(body_mass_g ~ bill_length_mm + bill_depth_mm + species, data = simulated_mix_x)
summary(mix_x)
summary(mix_x_sim)
```
